Bus Timings

Bus 155 Timings Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to Shakhbout City, ADNOC

February 12, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This route connects the bustling Al Danah district with Shakhbout City, stopping at key locations along the way. Whether you’re a commuter, a student, or simply exploring the city, Bus 155 ensures convenient travel between some of the capital’s most important destinations. Let’s dive into everything you need to know about the route, stops, timings, and more!

Operational Details

Reg Bus 155 operates throughout the day, providing frequent services for both early risers and evening travelers. Here’s the detailed schedule:

From Khalifa Bin Zayed Street From Shakhbout City, ADNOC
05:55 06:00
06:40 06:42
07:25 07:27
07:28 07:29
08:07 08:14
08:13 08:15
08:52 09:00
08:58 09:02
09:40 09:47
10:25 10:30
11:55 10:32
13:25 11:59
14:54 12:00
14:55 13:29
16:25 13:30
17:10 14:59
17:54 15:00
17:58 16:28
18:40 16:29
18:41 17:15
19:25 17:59
20:10 18:00
20:55 18:44
20:57 18:45
22:25 19:32
23:55 20:15
20:59  
21:00  
22:29  
22:30  
23:59  

Download PDF Bus 155

Bus 155 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for 155 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Ticket pricing for Reg Bus 155 is simple and affordable, making it a cost-effective option for regular travelers.

  • Cash Ticket: AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer.

  • Payment Methods: Passengers can purchase and top up their Hafilat Smart Card at kiosks across Abu Dhabi or online. The Hafilat card offers a convenient and cashless way to pay for bus rides, ensuring quick and hassle-free transactions.

Route Overview

The journey on Reg Bus 155 begins at Al Danah, Sultan Bin Zayed Street/Khalifa Bin Zayed Street and concludes at Shakhbout City, ADNOC.

Here are the key stops along the route:

  1. Capital Park A great spot for relaxation, offering lush green spaces in the heart of the city.

  2. Gold Center Famous for its extensive selection of jewelry and retail stores, ideal for shopping enthusiasts.

  3. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A peaceful place for worship.

  4. Abu Dhabi Bus Station A central hub where passengers can transfer to other bus routes across the city.

  5. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A key artery in the city, passing through several business and residential areas.

6.

  1. Al Maqta Bus Interchange A crucial transfer point for passengers switching between different bus routes.

  2. Abu Dhabi University A major educational institution in the capital, popular with students and staff.

  3. Military School Located nearby for those commuting to the school.

  4. Street 26 A residential and commercial zone, providing access to various facilities.

  5. Theyab Bin Eissa Street A key street serving both residential and commercial properties.

  6. Street 21 Another important street connecting residents to the wider city.

  7. Al Jawhar Street A mix of residential and commercial areas, making it a popular stop.

  8. Al Ruwad Street A significant street in Shakhbout City with both residential and public services.

  9. Theyab Bin Eissa Street A repeat stop connecting with additional streets in Shakhbout City.

  10. Cambridge Medical & Rehabilitation Center Offering medical and rehabilitation services.

  11. Civil Defence Center Near the city’s emergency services hub.

  12. American International School A popular educational institution for local and international students.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al ‘Umlat Street A key street within Shakhbout City.

  2. Al Watan School Located along the route for students and staff.

  3. Al Mutakayyif Street A residential street connecting to various other parts of Shakhbout City.

  4. Al Turoush Street Another residential area, offering easy access to homes and services.

  5. Al Jawhar Street Another stop on this major residential street.

24.

  1. Stop 15072 A designated stop in Shakhbout City.

  2. Al Tafdeel Street A residential area with convenient access to the surrounding neighborhoods.

  3. Stop 15076 A stop close to essential services.

  4. Shakhbout City, ADNOC The final stop, home to the UAE’s leading energy company.

Accessibility Features

The buses are equipped with ramps, designated seating for differently-abled passengers, and audio-visual aids for individuals with hearing or vision impairments. This commitment to accessibility ensures that everyone can travel with dignity and ease across the city.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

These transfer points make it easy for passengers to switch between different bus services, offering seamless travel across the capital. In addition to its connectivity with bus routes, the route integrates well with the broader Abu Dhabi transport network, helping passengers access metro services and future transport developments.

Nearby Attractions

Taking Reg Bus 155 gives you access to a range of key landmarks and attractions in Abu Dhabi:

  • Capital Park

  • Gold Center
  • Mariam Bint Said Mosque
  • Abu Dhabi University
  • Shakhbout City

Journey Experience

A trip on the 155 bus route from Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to Shakhbout City, ADNOC offers a long yet scenic journey through some key areas of Abu Dhabi. Starting in the vibrant city center at Khalifa Bin Zayed Street, passengers can enjoy views of modern architecture and bustling commercial areas.

As the bus progresses, it passes through quieter residential neighborhoods, providing a glimpse into the city’s suburban life. Along the way, passengers may catch sights of important landmarks and enjoy the contrast between the urban energy and the more relaxed outskirts of Abu Dhabi.

Travel Tips

To ensure a smooth and enjoyable journey on Reg Bus 155, here are a few tips:

  1. Plan ahead: Check the bus timings to avoid long waits at the stop.

  2. Use the app: Download the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app for real-time updates and route changes.

  3. Travel during off-peak hours: If possible, travel during less busy times to avoid crowds.

  4. Carry a Hafilat Card: This makes payments quicker and more convenient.

Reg Bus 155 offers a reliable, affordable, and accessible solution for navigating Abu Dhabi. Whether you’re commuting to work, heading to university, or exploring the city, this route connects you to some of the capital’s most important locations.

With frequent bus timings, seamless connectivity, and excellent accessibility features, Reg Bus 155 is a fantastic option for both residents and visitors looking to travel across Abu Dhabi efficiently. Hop on board and experience the convenience of Abu Dhabi’s public transportation at its finest! For more travel options and detailed route information, be sure to check out the Full Abu Dhabi Bus Routes to plan your journeys with ease.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
